title: models of buses with seating capacity of 13 or more passengers excluding driver from the applicability of sub-rule (1) of rule 125C of the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989 up to 30th June, 2017

[F. No. RT-11028/02/2013-MVL]. ABHAY DAMLE, Jt. Secy. -- 1 of 1 --
